---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph description of the feature and why it matters.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits? (e.g. "Developers deploying to GCP have no Terraform module", "Users with an existing Supabase database can't skip the RDS provisioning step")

## Proposed solution

How you'd like to see it implemented. Rough is fine — we can refine together in the discussion.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] Possibly, with some guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

Links, prior art, screenshots, or anything else relevant.
